data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_form_depno(sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no) as dep_acc_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MON YYYY') as requestment_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract, 'SD MON YYYY') as begining_of_contract_tdate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount) as loan_request_tamount ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_req_coll.req_amount) as req_tamount ,sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
from sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_req_coll ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where 1 = 2
